span.p:
failure rate >= 50%
min 5 calls required

counted as failure
 IOException
 TimeoutException
 WebClient 5xx / BadGateway / GatewayTimeout

ignored (not counted)
 WebClient 4xx (BadRequest, Unprocessable)
